# Docs toolkit — agent instructions

This repository builds the public documentation site. Edit sources under
`content/`; everything under `site/` is build output.

<!-- This file is auto-generated. Do not edit by hand; run `make update` to regenerate. -->

## Working on the docs

- Keep pages under 120 lines; split long guides into subpages.
- Screenshots live in `content/images/`.
